subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Verily, We have answered thee aforetime, and unto this thy heart and thy soul and thy spirit bear witness, and beyond these beareth witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی انا قد  اجبناک  قبل ذلک و یشهد بذلک قلبک و نفسک و روحک و من ورآء ذلک یشهد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
